title: Leaderboard
description: A DeepRacer racing leaderboard where participants submit model performances.

arn.description: The ARN uniquely identifying the leaderboard.

name.description: The display name of the leaderboard.

isQualifier.description: Whether this leaderboard qualifies participants for championship events.

trackType.description: The type of track used for this leaderboard.

minimumCountOfLaps.description: Minimum number of consecutive laps required.
